text: There is a curious sense of remove as I observe this scene from behind glass, as if I am both participant and observer. Entering the exhibit space, I notice the text about R+D—Responsive and rapidly evolving, yet there is a distant hum, a lingering hesitation. I feel like an explorer stepping into a mental laboratory, surrounded by artifacts of inquiry. Everything seems calculated yet inviting to reflection. I am intrigued by the impulse to search for meaning in these curated details, and at the same time, I sense my own presence being absorbed and reflected here.
